article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.5. Attachment 1 - Proposed Bylaw Amendments (E-Bike Share and Electric Kick Scooter) 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Bylaw Changes Would Set New Rules for E-Bikes and Electric Scooters
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on bylaw amendments that would create new rules for shared e-bikes and electric kick scooters in Burnaby — covering where they can be parked, where they can be ridden, and what fines apply for breaking the rules.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council vote — if you operate near bike-share zones or use e-scooters for deliveries, this could affect you.
